name: mouse_olfactory_receptors
description: Mouse olfactory receptor (OR) gene clusters. Mouse has ~1100 intact OR genes (~30% more than human), organized into ~40 genomic clusters spread across nearly every chromosome but with hotspots on chr2, chr7, chr9, chr11, chr14, chr17, and chrX. Each gene is a ~1 kb intronless 7-transmembrane GPCR. Within-cluster pairwise identity 60-95%; between-cluster identity 40-70%. The largest cluster (chr7) contains >100 OR genes within ~3 Mb. Pseudogene fraction is ~25% in mouse (~50% in human).
